scripts.build: echo 'Worker bundles via wrangler — no separate build step'
scripts.db:apply:local: wrangler d1 execute codantrix-labs-db --local --file=./schema/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute codantrix-labs-db --local --file=./schema/0002_rate_limit.sql && wrangler d1 execute codantrix-labs-db --local --file=./schema/0003_writing_posts.sql && wrangler d1 execute codantrix-labs-db --local --file=./schema/0004_writing_auth.sql
scripts.db:apply:remote: wrangler d1 execute codantrix-labs-db --remote --file=./schema/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute codantrix-labs-db --remote --file=./schema/0002_rate_limit.sql && wrangler d1 execute codantrix-labs-db --remote --file=./schema/0003_writing_posts.sql && wrangler d1 execute codantrix-labs-db --remote --file=./schema/0004_writing_auth.sql
scripts.db:apply:writing:remote: wrangler d1 execute codantrix-labs-db --remote --file=./schema/0003_writing_posts.sql && wrangler d1 execute codantrix-labs-db --remote --file=./schema/0004_writing_auth.sql
